company: Rocket Lab Corp (Rocket Lab USA, Inc.)
source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001819994 + web sources (per-field)
_note: EDGAR total_debt tag returned an incomplete $1.716M; corrected to the real interest-bearing debt (convertible notes + term loans) from balance-sheet source. Cash from EDGAR ($1,205.499M) matches stockanalysis.com ($1,206M). EPS history is all-negative so EPS CAGR and trailing P/E are not meaningful; the growth metric for this name is REVENUE growth.

dividend_per_share.source: none found - company pays no dividend

shares_outstanding.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001819994 (CommonStockSharesOutstanding); stockanalysis.com shows ~578.9M

total_debt.source: stockanalysis.com/stocks/rklb balance sheet (total interest-bearing debt: 4.25% convertible senior notes due 2029 + Trinity term loan; declining as converts convert to equity). EDGAR's $1.716M XBRL tag was incomplete and was overridden.

cash.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001819994 (CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue); matches stockanalysis.com $1,206M. Note: cash + marketable securities total ~$1.48B per Q1-2026 8-K.

long_term_growth_estimate_pct.source: stockanalysis.com/stocks/rklb/forecast - consensus 2026 REVENUE growth (avg 51.3%, range 41.4-63.3%), 18 analysts (S&P Global). This is a revenue-growth estimate; EPS remains negative (2026 consensus EPS approx -0.12).

institutional_ownership_pct.source: marketbeat.com / wallstreetzen RKLB ownership (50.18% institutional, ~29.3% insiders, ~20.5% retail)

insider_activity.value: net selling, heavy. Gross insider sales during the 2025-26 run-up: CEO Peter Beck >$140M (Dec 2025), CFO Adam Spice >$100M (Jan 2026) plus ~$8.9M (2026-05-26) and a ~$4.3M sell-to-cover (Mar 2026). Beck net -5.04M shares over 18 months. Net insider selling on the order of tens of millions TTM (~$41M cited by Simply Wall St aggregate). Much is under 10b5-1 plans, but the scale is large and one-directional into a ~400% price run-up.
insider_activity.source: Nasdaq, Investing.com, GuruFocus, Simply Wall St / SEC Form 4 aggregates

analyst_price_target.source: stockanalysis.com/stocks/rklb/forecast - 18-analyst average price target, BELOW the 2026-06-05 close of $110.08 (i.e., consensus models no upside from here)

ev_sales.source: Alpha Spread (EV/Sales ~104x); P/S ~61x. Market cap ~$63-66B on ~$601.8M FY2025 revenue.

cash_burn_per_year.source: FY2025 free cash flow approx -$321.8M (operating cash flow deficit + $156.3M capex) per stockanalysis.com cash-flow statement / macrotrends

revenue_q1_2026.source: RKLB Q1-2026 8-K/10-Q (three months ended 2026-03-31); up from $122.6M YoY = +63.5%

notes: EPS <= 0: P/E and PEG are not meaningful. There is no earnings-based valuation; any case rests on a binary/recovery/asset story (ch.13).
Growth >= 50% is rarely sustainable; discount it (ch.15).
Cash runway is a survival metric, not a thesis.
cash_runway_years uses cash-only (1.205B) over FY2025 burn (321.8M); counting ~1.48B total liquidity (cash + marketable securities) and the narrowing loss, effective runway is longer.
